description: Create a Bundle Product in Magento named 'Ultimate Camping Kit' (SKU: 'CAMP-BUNDLE-001') in the 'Sports' category. Configure the product with Dynamic Price: Yes, Dynamic Weight: Yes, Status: Enabled, Visibility: Catalog, Search, and Ship Bundle Items: Together. Include three bundle options: 'Choose Your Tent' (Radio Buttons, Required) with 'Basic 2-Person Tent' (as default) and 'Family 4-Person Tent'; 'Select Sleeping Gear' (Drop-down, Required) with 'Lightweight Sleeping Bag' (as default) and 'Winter Insulated Sleeping Bag'; and 'Add Camp Kitchen' (Checkbox, Not Required) with 'Portable Camp Stove' and 'Camp Cookware Set'. The constituent simple products are already available in the catalog for assignment.
